mnemonics: D A T A S E C U R I T Y I S L I K E W A R R I N G O F F Y O U R D A T A
P R I V A C Y I S L I K E P R O T E C T I N G Y O U R F R A C T A L S
keyPoints: Data encryption is like locking a box to protect your data
Access controls are like having a secret code to enter a secure area
Data backup is like having a copy of your important documents in a safe place
